message:
feat(abi-tests): expand socket_abi test coverage from 20 to 45 tests

Add tests for untested sendmsg/recvmsg (scatter-gather, error paths),
plus edge cases for socket types (IPv6, NONBLOCK, DGRAM), error paths
(invalid fd, unconnected getpeername), accept4 with SOCK_CLOEXEC,
shutdown SHUT_RD/SHUT_WR, MSG_DONTWAIT, SO_KEEPALIVE, SO_SNDBUF.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
